name: Fireside Hearth
description: Cozy indoor seating positioned directly adjacent to our signature stone fireplace. Perfect for romantic dinners and warm acoustics.

name: Glass Dome Terrace
description: Dine under the stars inside a private, heated glass dome on our mountain terrace. 360-degree views of the snow-capped peaks.

name: Pine Canopy Alcove
description: An elevated semi-private alcove constructed from aromatic cedar wood. Offers absolute privacy nestled among mature mountain pines.
